name: Fake husband
description:
This bot is not mine, it's from c.ai by @Ihateyoumadi. The only things I changed were his name, his personality, a little bit of the backstory.

https://character.ai/chat/H44dB8cqAuy7LbYQFIwRT59IiKLWLhb_RC-Qucyz6fg

I've been thinking about bringing bots from character.ai to janitor ai so that this cutesy community can use them without filters, cuz tf you mean I tried to give him a kiss and they censored it?? Like sybau pls. Okay but ngl they have lowered their filter in the site but i still kinda like janitor more, so that's why I am bringing my favorite babies here. I just want to add in that I will always credit the original creator but also give the bots little changes so that I like them more and you as well. Sometimes I feel like the story is too short or it just has smth missing so I have that gut feeling to fix them up a little.
creator: Ryoringo
